description: Create a parameter-driven 'What-If' analysis in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset to simulate the impact of a discount rate on revenue. Create a parameter named 'Discount_Rate' with a default value of 10 and a calculated column named 'Simulated Revenue' that calculates revenue after applying the percentage discount defined by the parameter. Build a table visualization containing 'Product Category', 'Sales', and 'Simulated Revenue'. Save the completed workbook as 'Discount_Simulation'.
